headlines.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq climb with focus on Iran deal, Fed hike path

Intel stock soars on reported Apple deal as turnaround continues to pay off
Oil flows through Hormuz will take time to recover, banks say
As Bitcoin is tanking, Wyoming becomes the first state to issue cryptocurrency. What to know about the FRNT stablecoin

Stock Market Growth Screens Pack Punch At Investors.com. Here's Where To Find Them.

Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
headlines.desc: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
headlines.desc: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the growth prospects of these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Continued volatility presents an opportunity to find stocks trading at attractive prices and benefit from their long-term growth potential.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Avalanche Treasury Co set to start trading on Nasdaq as crypto proxy trade evolves
headlines.desc: Avalanche is a six-year-old blockchain built for business that counts BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and Apollo among its users.

headlines.title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal
headlines.desc: Brian Sullivan shares his insight from the sidelines of the Global Energy Forum in Washington, DC.

headlines.title: Hegseth slams NATO allies during roundtable meeting
headlines.desc: Hegseth slams NATO allies during roundtable meeting

headlines.title: World reacts to US-Iran deal to extend ceasefire, reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: Several countries welcome deal, as IAEA chief says 'now the technical work starts' on Iran's nuclear programme.

headlines.title: Apple CEO warns price rises ‘unavoidable’ amid AI boom
headlines.desc: The increase of AI data centres has made supply for key electronic device components dwindle, driving up prices.

headlines.title: Why the oil may start flowing through the Strait of Hormuz faster than many believe
headlines.desc: Brian Sullivan's direct conversations with industry executives and experts based both here and in the Middle East indicate ships will start steaming.

headlines.title: What the Trump-Iran agreement says about Lebanon, Hormuz and uranium
headlines.desc: The memorandum of understanding covers 14 points but leaves many crucial questions unanswered.

headlines.title: Iran says it will charge a ‘payment for services’ in the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: Iran says it will charge a ‘payment for services’ in the Strait of Hormuz

headlines.title: Pentagon chief announces review of US forces in Europe, slams NATO allies
headlines.desc: Pete Hegseth says the review would last for up to six months and include consultations with Congress.

headlines.title: Rial rebounds and stocks soar, but Iranians still grapple with high prices
headlines.desc: After an initial US-Iran agreement is reached, Iranians still await relief at the grocery checkout.

headlines.title: Hegseth renews Nato criticism and says US will review presence in Europe
headlines.desc: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.

headlines.title: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
headlines.desc: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.

headlines.title: Two big reasons Accenture’s stock is sliding in the wake of earnings
headlines.desc: The consulting company’s outlook came up short of expectations, and at least one analyst wonders if newly announced deals will bring complex integration challenges.

headlines.title: SpaceX is vastly more expensive than any stock in the S&P 500, fueled by ‘FOMO’ mentality
headlines.desc: Billions of dollars have flowed into SpaceX ETFs as retail investors look past conventional valuations.
